meaning: 这首儿歌通过重复的句式展现了团队合作的重要性，教导孩子们遇到困难时要团结互助、共同力量大，同时培养节奏感和语言韵律能力。
characterDescription: A cute anthropomorphic old man with white beard and round glasses, a plump red-faced carrot with big eyes and smile, a small brown dog, a yellow cat, and a tiny gray mouse. All characters have soft, rounded features, large expressive eyes, and wear simple, bright-colored clothing.
styleDescription: Bright cartoon style, vivid saturated colors, soft lighting, clean lines, rounded shapes suitable for infants, warm and cheerful atmosphere.

scenes.title: 老爷爷拔萝卜
scenes.description: 老爷爷在菜园里用力拔萝卜，脸涨得通红，身体后仰，双手紧紧抓住萝卜叶子。萝卜纹丝不动。

scenes.description: 小姑娘跑过来，拉住老爷爷的衣角，一起用力拔。她表情坚定，眼睛看着萝卜。
